stemHtml:
Refer to figure. 
An IFR flight routes direct from New York (KJFK) to Amsterdam (EHAM) with the alternate Brussels (EBBR) on an eastbound track. There is a westerly mean wind of approximately 40 knots. Where can you expect the Point of Equal Time (PET) along the track?

options.a: In the middle of the route to Brussels.
options.b: In the middle of the route to Amsterdam.
